content.text:
I’m ready to summarize, but I don’t see the text yet. Please paste the content you want summarized (or share a link). If it’s long, you can send it in parts.

Optional details to specify:
- Desired length (one sentence, 3-5 bullets, a short paragraph, etc.)
- Target audience or purpose
- Focus (main ideas, arguments, data, conclusions)

I can provide:
- A one-sentence summary
- A bullet-point outline of key points
- A short 2–3 paragraph synopsis

If you’d like, I can also reuse this content as context for future questions in this chat.
